# Coffee

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Coffee;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Coffee { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
drink, cup, mug, tea, cafe, hot, beverage

## Categories
food-beverage
